name: Buttered Popcorn Bread
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Popcorn, popped and seasoned with salt
-crushed by hand or in a food processor until reduced to
1 tbsp Popcorn oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven.
2. In a large bowl, combine all the ingredients listed above in the order given.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased baking pan and spread evenly.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until the bread is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before slicing.
6. Serve warm with Better for Bread butter or your favorite topping while watching movies on your TV screen.
